values: Read memory before starting, write memory after completing
non_negotiable_rules: Always read memory before starting a task
Documentation updates for changed APIs are part of the same task, not follow-on

_failure_schema.description: What happened and why it was a problem
_failure_schema.lesson: Specific action taken to prevent recurrence
_failure_schema.ruleAdded: Reference to rule added (critical only), null otherwise

_severity_response.critical: Add immediate rule to AGENT.md non-negotiable rules
_severity_response.high: Add check item to reviewer checklist
